about.title: Professional Summary
about.line2: > Seeking a role spanning Infrastructure and AI-Augmented Development, growing strong across both domains.
about.line3: > Next: AI-Enhanced Infrastructure Engineering — leveraging structured Agentic SDLC to build production-grade tools.

about.line5: > AI Ops: Structured SDLC orchestration over vibe coding. AI as tool, not dependency. Human Gate decisive.

skills.title: Technical Expertise
projects.title: ## Projects
project1.type: Open Source — Python Package · MIT License
project1.name: Agent-Guidance-MCP
project1.desc: MCP server delivering AI agent guidance via a 168-skill catalog, bundled standards corpus, workflow prompts, bounded project-code context tools, and a token optimization engine — over Stdio transport. Compatible with Claude, Cursor, VS Code, Gemini CLI, and 9+ IDEs.
project1.meta1_val: 168-skill catalog covering backend, frontend, security, DevOps, data, and 12+ language ecosystems.
project1.meta2_val: task_pipeline, guidance, project_context, ui_ux, session_continuity, health_check.
project1.meta3_val: Single-command bootstrap via curl/PowerShell. Auto-configures all local IDE clients.
project1.flow1: Claude / Cursor / VS Code / Gemini CLI
project2.name: AI-Powered Health Assistant
project2.desc: An offline-first Android health ecosystem integrating Google Health Connect, AI medical RAG, and multi-tier sync — successfully defended as a UIT graduation thesis.
project2.meta1_val: 4-tier system across Compose UI, Room/WorkManager, FastAPI server, and PySide6 admin panel.
project2.meta2_val: Multi-mode AI (RAG ChromaDB / on-device LiteRT-LM / external API) + Google Health Connect (20+ metrics).
project2.meta3_val: Delta Sync Gen 2, Argon2id, JWT rotation, Fernet encryption, AES-256-GCM backup.
project3.name: NAS Storage & Domain Infrastructure
project3.desc: Architected and deployed an enterprise-grade NAS storage solution for centralized data management across the manufacturing plant. Configured Windows Server Domain Controller with Active Directory, DNS, and DHCP services. Designed and implemented relational databases to support localized factory operations based on technical specifications from parent headquarters.
project4.name: Site-to-Site Private Network Connectivity
project4.desc: Designed and implemented secure Site-to-Site VPN connections between multiple factory sites, enabling private, encrypted data synchronization across the corporate network. Configured routing policies, tunnel negotiation, and failover to ensure 99.9% uptime for inter-factory communication.
project5.name: CCTV Surveillance System Deployment
project5.desc: Planned and executed a comprehensive CCTV deployment across the factory: surveyed site layouts, determined optimal camera positions, routed structural cabling (network and power), configured NVR recording schedules and retention policies, and integrated the system into the existing network infrastructure for centralized remote monitoring.
project6.name: Internal Business Software Solutions
project6.desc: Designed and developed custom software applications to streamline workflows across multiple company departments. Analyzed departmental requirements, architected database schemas, and directed AI-assisted development to produce production-grade utilities for inventory tracking, report generation, and operational data management.
